title: wolfhsm: key.rs and nvm.rs
description: key.rs: KeyId(pub(crate) whKeyId) newtype; pub(crate) helpers key_evict, key_commit, key_erase, key_revoke, key_wrap, key_unwrap_and_cache. nvm.rs: NvmId=whNvmId (u16), NvmObject{id,label,size,access,flags}, NvmAvailable{objects,bytes}; fn available, list (treat NOTFOUND as loop termination), read, write (destroy old by label then NvmAddObject — NvmAddObject does not replace existing), delete, find_by_label. Enforce WH_NVM_LABEL_LEN=24 before any round-trip, return Error::LabelTooLong{max:24} immediately.
